steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
Add the left sides and the right sides:
$$(x+4)+(x-4)=(-2y+9)+(2y+5)$$

steps.title: Use the canceled terms
steps.content:
The constants on the left cancel, and the $y$-terms on the right cancel:
$$2x=14$$
The question asks for $2x$, so no further solving is needed. The answer is C.
